'''Tony DeZuniga''' was a comic-book artist from the Philippines. He drew a few of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] covers and worked with writer [[Roy Thomas]] on a serialized story arc, titled ''[[The Keeper's World]]'', for the [[Marvel Comics]] teen magazine ''[[Pizzazz]]''. This story was reprinted in the exclusive ''[[Star Wars 0]]''.

*''[[The Keeper's World]]''
*[[Star Wars Weekly 47|''Star Wars Weekly'' 47]]
*[[Star Wars Weekly 48|''Star Wars Weekly'' 48]]
*[[Star Wars Weekly 49|''Star Wars Weekly'' 49]]
*[[Star Wars Weekly 50|''Star Wars Weekly'' 50]]
*''[[Star Wars 0]]''
